response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep exposure to cloud tools and agentic workflows — aligning well with core requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and measurable impact in enterprise GenAI deployments, raising uncertainty about senior-level readiness in this specific domain.
strengths: Experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and scalable systems
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited detail on enterprise customer-facing technical discovery or AI evaluation pipelines
